entity.name: Kelvin
entity.description: Solo developer in Jakarta, Indonesia. Builder of Loker Dollar (lokerdollar.com) — a free AI job-search assistant for Indonesian and global talent, and the open remote-job market dataset published in this repository.

projects.name: Loker Dollar — Open Remote Job Market Data
projects.description: A continuously-updated, openly-licensed (CC BY 4.0) dataset of remote jobs paying in USD, AI-enriched with structured skills, salary ranges, green/red flags, and Indonesia-fit signals. Published as a Frictionless Data package and refreshed weekly. Powers free public labor-market transparency for job seekers in emerging markets who are otherwise priced out of paid market-data products.

channels.description: Funding arrangements coordinated by email at kelvindsmn@gmail.com.

plans.name: Annual data pipeline maintenance
plans.description: Covers a year of AI enrichment inference (skills/salary/flag extraction), data collection across job sources, and weekly open-dataset publication, keeping the free public labor-market dataset current.
